title: Chronicle Books
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
{{Otheruses|Chronicles}}
[[File:ChronicleBooks.png|thumb|right|238px|Chronicle Books logo]]
'''Chronicle Books''' is one of the publishers of ''[[Star Wars]]'' books. They also publish ''Star Wars'' board games under their subsidiary '''Ridley's Games'''.

{{Company-stub|real}}
